data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of syncing back to the main booking system, but there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality. The evidence only includes successful booking steps and configurations, but lacks any checks or confirmations related to the synchronization process. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding this specific requirement.
gaps: No evidence of syncing back to the main booking system.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add validation for sync back to main booking system
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that bookings are correctly synced back to the main booking system.
